title: Smoky Crispy German Potato Hash
description: Earthy, flaky German-style hash with a smoky kick, topped with unsweetened sour cream and chopped chives—perfect for a post‑workout reset.

ingredients.name: Unsweetened sour cream
ingredients.notes: use a dairy or plant‑based option if desired

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium‑high heat; add bacon and cook until crisp, about 5–7 minutes. Remove bacon with a slotted spoon and set aside.
Add diced onions to the skillet and sauté until translucent, 3–4 minutes.
Add diced potatoes, season with salt, pepper, smoked paprika, and liquid smoke. Stir to coat and cook until potatoes begin to brown, 10–12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Return the cooked bacon to the skillet, mix well, and cook for another 5 minutes until potatoes are golden and crispy.
Transfer the hash to a serving platter. In a small bowl whisk the sour cream with chopped chives and a squeeze of lemon juice if desired; season with a pinch of salt.
Serve the hot hash with the chive‑sour‑cream dip on the side, garnished with extra chives if desired. Enjoy!
